title: Chronon3D Benchmark Report (flat, v1)
description: Canonical user-facing flat JSON schema for Chronon3D benchmark reports.  All 16 fields are REQUIRED.  Coexists with `docs/schemas/chronon3d.bench.v3.schema.json` (which remains the C++ SSoT); see `tools/lib_perf_regression.py` FIELD_MAP for the v3 ↔ flat field mapping.  The validator at `tools/validate_benchmark_json.sh` reads the `required` array of THIS schema as the SSoT for which fields are mandatory (no Cat-3 anti-dup between schema and validator).

commit.description: Git commit SHA at which the benchmark was executed (short SHA 7+ hex chars or full 40-char SHA).

cpu.description: CPU model identifier, e.g. 'Intel(R) Xeon(R) CPU E5-2680 v4 @ 2.40GHz' or 'AMD EPYC 7763 64-Core Processor'.  Mirrors `tools/benchmark_host_info.sh::get_cpu_model`.

scene.description: Scene / comp_id under benchmark, e.g. 'BenchB00_EmptyFrame' or 'product_launch'.  Mirrors `chronon3d.bench.v3::comp_id`.

threads.description: Number of TBB worker threads used during the run; mirrors `scheduler.concurrency()`.

cold_first_frame_ms.description: Wall time (ms) from render start to the FIRST frame completion (excludes warmup).  Maps to `chronon3d.bench.v3::metrics.time_to_first_frame_ms`.

frame_p50_ms.description: 50th-percentile steady-state frame time in ms (post-warmup).  Maps to `chronon3d.bench.v3::metrics.p50_frame_ms` and `metrics.median_frame_ms`.

frame_p95_ms.description: 95th-percentile steady-state frame time in ms.  Maps to `chronon3d.bench.v3::metrics.p95_frame_ms`.

frame_p99_ms.description: 99th-percentile steady-state frame time in ms.  Maps to `chronon3d.bench.v3::metrics.p99_frame_ms`.

peak_rss_mb.description: Peak resident set size in megabytes.  Maps to `chronon3d.bench.v3::memory.peak_rss_mb`.

allocations_per_frame.description: Average heap allocations per frame (post-warmup).  Maps to `chronon3d.bench.v3::memory.allocations_per_frame`.

full_frame_copies.description: Number of full-frame passes / copies during the run.  SEMANTIC MAPPING (not 1:1 identity) to `chronon3d.bench.v3::counters.full_frame_passes` — see TICKET-BENCH-SCHEMA-V1 for the disambiguation note.

cache_hit_ratio.description: Ratio of cache hits over total cache lookups (0.0 - 1.0).  SEMANTIC MAPPING to `chronon3d.bench.v3::counters.cache_hit_rate`.

output_hash.description: Hexadecimal deterministic hash of the rendered output (16-128 hex chars).  Maps to `chronon3d.bench.v3::quality.deterministic_hash`.

governor.description: Effective CPU frequency governor at run start.  Typical values: 'performance', 'powersave', 'ondemand', 'schedutil', 'conservative', 'userspace', 'unknown'.  Mirrors `tools/benchmark_host_info.sh::get_cpu_governor`.

kernel.description: Kernel release identifier, e.g. '5.15.0-91-generic' or '6.1.0-18-amd64'.  Mirrors `uname -r` and `tools/benchmark_host_info.sh::get_kernel`.

compiler_preset.description: CMake preset used for the build, e.g. 'linux-fast-dev', 'linux-fast-bench', 'linux-vcpkg-dev', 'linux-vcpkg-bench'.  Mirrors `tools/benchmark_host_info.sh::get_cmake_preset` (env var `CHRONON3D_BENCHMARK_PRESET`).
